case_title: KAPLAN, WM. S. et al VS GARFINKEL, SANFORD MR.DBA CHARTER CONSTRUCTION CO.

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GARFINKEL, SANFORD MR.DBA CHARTER CONSTRUCTION CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAPLAN, WM. S. CONSULTING STRUCTURAL ENGINEER, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARFINKEL, SANFORD MR.DBA CHARTER CONSTRUCTION CO. $225.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $261.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
